# Paul John Graham Blog
> An archive of articles from LinkedIn and Substack by Paul John Graham, covering software development, API design, search engine indexing, and technology architecture.

This file provides a clean, markdown-formatted directory of the site's content, specifically optimized for Large Language Models (LLMs) and agentic web validators/crawlers.

## Navigation & Feeds

- [Home Page](https://potnoddle.github.io/): Main homepage.
- [Full Archive (TXT)](https://potnoddle.github.io/llms-full.txt): Complete full-text archive of all posts for offline or batch AI consumption.
- [Sitemap (XML)](https://potnoddle.github.io/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable XML sitemap.
- [Sitemap (TXT)](https://potnoddle.github.io/sitemap.txt): Plain-text URL list.
- [RSS Feed](https://potnoddle.github.io/feed.xml): XML RSS feed of all articles.

## Social Links

- [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pauljgraham/): Paul Graham's LinkedIn.
- [Substack Newsletter](https://pauljohngraham.substack.com/): Substack newsletter.
